title: YAML Shell Context Actions functions configuration
description: Defines shell functions available from the VS Code Explorer right-click menu.

functions.description: Shell functions shown in the right-click command picker.

name.description: Display name shown in the VS Code Quick Pick.

description.description: Optional short description shown next to the function name.

command.description: Shell command sent to the VS Code integrated terminal. Supports template variables such as ${path}, ${workspaceFolder}, and ${selectedType}.

cwd.description: Working directory for the terminal. Supports the same template variables as command. Prefer raw path variables such as ${rawWorkspaceFolder}, ${rawPath}, or ${rawFileDirname}.

match.description: Optional JavaScript regular expression. The function is only shown when every selected file or folder matches its workspace-relative path normalized with forward slashes. Example: ^src/.*\.ts$

terminalName.description: Optional integrated terminal name. Defaults to the function name.

examples.name: Print selected path
examples.description: Echo the selected file or folder path

functions.name: Print selected path
functions.description: Echo the selected file or folder path
